channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Revenge of the AI Bubble
item.description: The AI bubble debate has gone through at least three intense phases in three years: suspicion over massive capital inflows into AI...

item.title: Trump suggests U.S. stake in AI companies could be beneficial
item.description: President Trump surprised tech CEOs by proposing the U.S. take a small ownership stake in AI giants, so the American people share...

item.title: Trump's Iran envoys hold quiet nuclear talks in Tennessee
item.description: President Trump's envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner traveled to the national lab in Oak Ridge, Tennessee on Thursday for consultations with a tea...

item.title: Kamala Harris leads redistricting fight in Louisiana
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris is heading to New Orleans later this summer as Democrats confront a Supreme Court ruling that could sharply reduce...
